EditTextPreference.android:title: Default Username
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Username for new connections and quick connect

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Enable SSH compression (default for new connections)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: X11 Forwarding
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Forward X11 display by default for new connections

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: SSH Agent Forwarding
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Forward SSH agent by default for new connections

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Custom Gestures
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Enable multi-touch gestures for multiplexer shortcuts (tmux/screen/zellij)

ListPreference.android:title: Gesture Multiplexer Type
ListPreference.android:summary: Which multiplexer to target with swipe gestures

EditTextPreference.android:title: tmux prefix
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Sent by the PRE key and gestures when tmux is active (default: C-b)
EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage:
Enter the prefix key for tmux.

Examples:
• C-b or ^b → Ctrl+B (tmux default)
• C-a or ^a → Ctrl+A
• C-Space or ^Space → Ctrl+Space
• M-b or Alt-b → Alt+B
• 0x02 → Hex byte value
• ` → Backtick literal

Leave empty to restore the default (C-b).

EditTextPreference.android:title: screen prefix
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Sent by the PRE key and gestures when screen is active (default: C-a)
EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage:
Enter the prefix key for GNU screen.

Examples:
• C-a or ^a → Ctrl+A (screen default)
• C-b or ^b → Ctrl+B
• C-Space or ^Space → Ctrl+Space
• M-b or Alt-b → Alt+B
• 0x01 → Hex byte value
• ` → Backtick literal

Leave empty to restore the default (C-a).

EditTextPreference.android:title: zellij prefix
EditTextPreference.android:summary: Sent by the PRE key and gestures when zellij is active (default: C-g)
EditTextPreference.android:dialogMessage:
Enter the prefix key for zellij.

Examples:
• C-g or ^g → Ctrl+G (zellij default)
• C-b or ^b → Ctrl+B
• C-Space or ^Space → Ctrl+Space
• M-b or Alt-b → Alt+B
• 0x07 → Hex byte value
• ` → Backtick literal

Leave empty to restore the default (C-g).
